name: DC Flow Prompts
description: DC Flow is the creative framework for generating music, lyrics, and spoken word content. It combines scriptural truth with authentic life experience to create kingdom-aligned art.

prompts.name: Testimony Track
prompts.prompt: Write about a real struggle you have been through and how God brought you out. Be raw, be real, be redemptive.

prompts.name: Scripture Song
prompts.prompt: Take a passage of Scripture and turn it into lyrics. Let the Word speak through the melody.

prompts.name: Battle Cry
prompts.prompt: Write an anthem for spiritual warfare. Declare victory over the enemy and stand on the promises of God.

prompts.name: Lament & Hope
prompts.prompt: Start in the pain. Sit in the struggle. But end with hope. Let the listener feel the journey from grief to glory.

prompts.name: Kingdom Vision
prompts.prompt: Paint a picture of what life looks like when you are walking in purpose. Cast vision for what God is building.

prompts.name: Recovery Anthem
prompts.prompt: Write for the person in the valley. The one fighting addiction, depression, or despair. Give them words to hold onto.

always: Avoid glorifying sin or harmful behavior
Include at least one scripture reference per song
Write from lived experience, not performance
End with hope, even if you start in pain
never: Create content purely for clout or profit
